title: Boost Converter Average Current Mode Strategy

sections.heading: When to use
sections.text: Use an inner current loop with a slower outer voltage loop for boost converters when transient performance must improve without pushing the voltage loop near the right-half-plane-zero limit.

sections.heading: Escalation trigger
sections.text: If a plain voltage loop becomes sluggish or overshoots as gains rise, move to average-current-mode control instead of trying to force a high-bandwidth single loop.
